description: Runtime authorization for AI agents and smart contracts via an immutable on-chain policy registry
name: io.github.smartpolicy-protocol/smartpolicy

environmentVariables.description: PolicyRegistry contract address (omit for the public Sepolia default)
environmentVariables.name: SMARTPOLICY_REGISTRY

environmentVariables.description: GrantVerifier contract address (omit for the public Sepolia default)
environmentVariables.name: SMARTPOLICY_VERIFIER

environmentVariables.description: EVM RPC endpoint (omit for the public Sepolia default)
environmentVariables.name: SMARTPOLICY_RPC_URL

environmentVariables.description: Optional grant-issuer private key; enables the grant_issue tool
environmentVariables.name: SMARTPOLICY_ISSUER_KEY
